title: Introducing badminton
creator_credit: Gillian Gilks, Mike Goodwin and Sports Films
brief_description: A coaching film which shows how to execute all the basic strokes of the game, badminton, and explains the basic tactics for singles, men’s doubles and mixed doubles. Intended for sports centres, schools and colleges.
